WITH users_2016 AS (
  SELECT user_id
  FROM user
  WHERE yelping_since LIKE '2016%'
),
reviews_2016_users AS (
  SELECT business_ref, review_id
  FROM review
  WHERE user_id IN (SELECT user_id FROM users_2016)
    AND COALESCE(
      TRY_STRPTIME(date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'),
      TRY_STRPTIME(date, '%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p'),
      TRY_STRPTIME(date, '%Y-%m-%d')
    ) >= '2016-01-01'
)
SELECT business_ref, COUNT(review_id) AS review_count
FROM reviews_2016_users
GROUP BY business_ref
ORDER BY review_count DESC
LIMIT 100;

args.sql:
WITH users_2016 AS (
  SELECT user_id
  FROM user
  WHERE yelping_since LIKE '2016%'
),
reviews_2016_users AS (
  SELECT business_ref, review_id
  FROM review
  WHERE user_id IN (SELECT user_id FROM users_2016)
    AND COALESCE(
      TRY_STRPTIME(date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'),
      TRY_STRPTIME(date, '%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p'),
      TRY_STRPTIME(date, '%Y-%m-%d')
    ) >= '2016-01-01'
),
business_reviews AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(SUBSTR(business_ref, LENGTH('businessref_') + 1) AS INTEGER) AS business_id_num,
    COUNT(review_id) AS review_count
  FROM reviews_2016_users
  GROUP BY business_id_num
),
business_categories AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(SUBSTR(business_id, LENGTH('businessid_') + 1) AS INTEGER) AS business_id_num,
    description
  FROM business
  WHERE business_id IS NOT NULL
),
category_exploded AS (
  SELECT
    business_id_num,
    TRIM(category) AS category
  FROM business_categories,
  UNNEST(REGEXP_SPLIT_TO_ARRAY(description, ',|;| and |&')) AS category
  WHERE description IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT category, SUM(review_count) AS total_reviews
FROM category_exploded
JOIN business_reviews USING (business_id_num)
GROUP BY category
ORDER BY total_reviews DESC
LIMIT 5;

399001.SZ, China
IXIC, United States
NSEI, India

args.sql:
WITH parsed AS (
  SELECT "Index",
    COALESCE(
      TRY_STRPTIME("Date", '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'),
      TRY_STRPTIME("Date", '%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p'),
      TRY_STRPTIME("Date", '%d %b %Y, %H:%M'),
      TRY_STRPTIME("Date", '%d %B %Y, %H:%M'),
      TRY_STRPTIME("Date", '%B %d, %Y at %H:%M'),
      TRY_STRPTIME("Date", '%m/%d/%Y %H:%M:%S')
    ) AS dt,
    "CloseUSD"
  FROM index_trade
),
monthly AS (
  SELECT "Index",
    DATE_TRUNC('month', dt) AS month,
    FIRST("CloseUSD" ORDER BY dt) AS open_price,
    LAST("CloseUSD" ORDER BY dt)  AS close_price
  FROM parsed
  WHERE dt IS NOT NULL AND "CloseUSD" IS NOT NULL AND "CloseUSD" > 0
  GROUP BY "Index", DATE_TRUNC('month', dt)
),
returns AS (
  SELECT "Index",
    SUM(close_price / open_price - 1) * 100 AS total_return_pct
  FROM monthly
  WHERE month >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CAST('2000-01-01' AS DATE))
  GROUP BY "Index"
  ORDER BY total_return_pct DESC
  LIMIT 5
)
SELECT r."Index", i."Exchange" FROM returns r
JOIN index_info i ON r."Index" = CASE
  WHEN i."Exchange" = 'New York Stock Exchange' THEN 'NYA'
  WHEN i."Exchange" = 'NASDAQ' THEN 'IXIC'
  WHEN i."Exchange" = 'Toronto Stock Exchange' THEN 'GSPTSE'
  WHEN i."Exchange" = 'Hong Kong Stock Exchange' THEN 'HSI'
  WHEN i."Exchange" = 'Shanghai Stock Exchange' THEN '000001.SS'
  WHEN i."Exchange" = 'Shenzhen Stock Exchange' THEN '399001.SZ'
  WHEN i."Exchange" = 'Tokyo Stock Exchange' THEN 'N225'
  WHEN i."Exchange" = 'National Stock Exchange of India' THEN 'NSEI'
  WHEN i."Exchange" = 'Taiwan Stock Exchange' THEN 'TWII'
  WHEN i."Exchange" = 'Euronext' THEN 'N100'
  WHEN i."Exchange" = 'Frankfurt Stock Exchange' THEN 'GDAXI'
  WHEN i."Exchange" = 'SIX Swiss Exchange' THEN 'SSMI'
  WHEN i."Exchange" = 'Johannesburg Stock Exchange' THEN 'J203.JO'

END

results.question: Which decade of publication (e.g., 1980s) has the highest average rating among decades with at least 10 distinct books that have been rated? Return the decade with the highest average rating.

args.sql:
WITH book_decades AS (
  SELECT
    book_id,
    CAST(SUBSTRING(details FROM '((?:19|20)\d{2})') AS INTEGER) AS pub_year
  FROM books_info
  WHERE details ILIKE '%written in English%'
),
book_decade_groups AS (
  SELECT
    book_id,
    (pub_year / 10) * 10 AS decade
  FROM book_decades
  WHERE pub_year IS NOT NULL
),
books_with_reviews AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    book_id
  FROM books_info b
  JOIN review_database.review r ON r.purchase_id = REPLACE(b.book_id, 'bookid_', 'purchaseid_')
),
decade_book_counts AS (
  SELECT
    decade,
    COUNT(DISTINCT book_id) AS distinct_books
  FROM book_decade_groups
  WHERE book_id IN (SELECT book_id FROM books_with_reviews)
  GROUP BY decade
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT book_id) >= 10
),
decade_avg_ratings AS (
  SELECT
    d.decade,
    AVG(r.rating) AS avg_rating
  FROM decade_book_counts d
  JOIN book_decade_groups bd ON d.decade = bd.decade
  JOIN review_database.review r ON r.purchase_id = REPLACE(bd.book_id, 'bookid_', 'purchaseid_')
  GROUP BY d.decade
)
SELECT decade, avg_rating
FROM decade_avg_ratings
ORDER BY avg_rating DESC
LIMIT 1;
